headline: Muni escalator outages pile up again downtown
body: Morning commuters kept rerouting through stalled escalators and crowded stairs while transit staff warned of another rough week for downtown stations.

headline: Office coffee bars keep raising prices in SoMa
body: Workers complained that six-dollar drip is starting to feel normal, especially in spots that still market themselves as community hubs for founders and remote teams.

headline: Més queixes al barri pel soroll de maletes i pisos turístics
body: Veïns de Ciutat Vella diuen que les nits tornen a sonar com un aeroport petit i que el descans s'ha convertit en una negociació diària.

headline: La L3 vuelve a ir llena antes del mediodía
body: Usuarios hablan de calor, prisas y turistas perdidos justo en la franja en la que antes todavía se podía viajar medio tranquilo.

headline: Ringbahn-Störungen ziehen sich durch den Vormittag
body: Pendler berichten von improvisierten Umwegen, vollen Bahnsteigen und dieser bekannten Mischung aus Resignation und schlechtem Timing.

headline: Neue Café-Eröffnung löst wieder Gentrifizierungsdebatte aus
body: Im Kiez streiten Anwohner darüber, ob der Block endlich etwas Nettes bekommt oder ob schon wieder derselbe keramische Albtraum einzieht.

headline: Severe delays hit the Victoria line again before 8 a.m.
body: Commuters reported packed platforms, damp coats, and the usual quiet rage of people pretending this was not going to decide the shape of their whole day.

headline: Pub landlords say football nights are carrying the week
body: Several neighbourhood pubs say match crowds are now the only evenings that still reliably feel full without turning every table twice.
